targets.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.chronicle =~ /${chronicle:regex}/)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.story =~ /${story:regex}/)
  |> group(columns: ["chronicle","story"])

list.name: chronicle
list.label: Chronicle
list.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> keep(columns: ["chronicle"]) 
  |> distinct(column: "chronicle")
  |> sort(columns: ["chronicle"]) 
  |> rename(columns: {chronicle: "_value"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])

list.name: story
list.label: Story
list.query:
from(bucket: "${bucket}")
  |> range(start: -30d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.chronicle =~ /${chronicle:regex}/)
  |> keep(columns: ["story"]) 
  |> distinct(column: "story")
  |> sort(columns: ["story"]) 
  |> rename(columns: {story: "_value"})
  |> keep(columns: ["_value"])
